name: prompt surfaces render playstyle and rulebook blocks separately when enabled

source.purpose: Covers Author/Narrator prompt rendering for campaign-local playstyle guidance and separate rulebook interpretations without model calls.

rollingProfile.informationEconomy: Player probes moral cost before acting.
rollingProfile.decisionArchitecture: Offer two costly vectors instead of a neutral menu.
rollingProfile.consequenceTiming: Let social costs become visible within the next beat.
rollingProfile.npcLegibility: Make guarded NPC motives inferable through behavior.
rollingProfile.errorTolerance: Clarify misreads only after one committed action.
avoidPatterns: Do not flatten choices into safe/unsafe labels

rulebookInterpretations.interpretation: Using a trusted person as a disposable instrument can trigger Stain even without violence.
rulebookInterpretations.campaignSpecificReading: Using a trusted person as a disposable instrument can trigger Stain even without violence.
triggers: deceives a trusted ward to make them absorb danger
costs: mark Stain or owe a public confession
permissions: strategic lies to hostile officials remain ordinary risk
rulebookInterpretations.setupRationale: The campaign premise binds oath harm to trust, not only violence.

input.playerInput: Ask what the oath would cost.
